_publications._publicationTitle: High-resolution mouse subventricular zone stem-cell niche transcriptome reveals features of lineage, anatomy, and aging
_publications._context: First description of the CGD transgene (Cre recombinase + enhanced histone H2B-GFP + diphtheria toxin receptor under rat Nestin promoter/enhancer), which is the Cre driver component of this model.

_publications._publicationTitle: Stem-like cells drive NF1-associated MPNST functional heterogeneity and tumor progression
_publications._context: First description of the CGD-based NP model (Nf1f/f;Trp53f/f;CGD) for NF1 MPNST. BC and DRG cells from E13.5 embryos were recombined with 4-OH tamoxifen and orthotopically injected into sciatic nerves of nude mice. Introduces the NP shorthand.

_publications._publicationTitle: Hydroxychloroquine prevents resistance to SHP2 inhibition in NF1-mutant cancers
_publications._context: Kinase enrichment proteomic analysis (MIB/MS) of NF1 MPNST tumors from the NP (Nf1flox/flox;Trp53flox/flox;CGD) GEMM treated with SHP099 and/or trametinib. PRIDE accession PXD035999.

basicInfo.description: Conditional double knockout of Nf1 and Trp53 driven by the CGD transgene (Cre recombinase, enhanced histone 2B-GFP, and diphtheria toxin receptor under the rat Nestin promoter/enhancer; CGD first described in Xie et al. 2020 PNAS). Abbreviated 'NP' in the Parada lab. Develops NF1-associated malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors (MPNSTs). Also referred to as Nf1f/f;Trp53f/f;Nes-TK. First described as a CGD-based allograft MPNST model in Sun et al. 2021 Cell Stem Cell.
